name: FinanceMCP
what_it_does: An MCP server providing access to 43+ financial data endpoints covering A-shares, US stocks, Hong Kong stocks, forex, futures, funds, bonds, options, and cryptocurrency. Integrates Tushare, Binance, and CoinGecko APIs with built-in technical analysis indicators (MACD, RSI, KDJ, Bollinger Bands).
use_cases: Querying Chinese A-share market data and financials via Claude
Cryptocurrency price monitoring across Binance and CoinGecko
Technical analysis with built-in indicators on stock/crypto data
Accessing macroeconomic indicators (GDP, CPI, PPI, PMI) for Chinese markets
Cross-market financial research combining stocks, crypto, bonds, and forex
not_for: Users who don't read Chinese - documentation and much of the interface is in Chinese
Real-time trading execution - this is data retrieval only
Western-market-only users who don't need A-share/Chinese market coverage
Users without a Tushare account for self-hosted deployment
best_when: You need comprehensive Chinese financial market data accessible through an AI agent, especially A-shares combined with crypto and macro indicators.
avoid_when: You don't read Chinese, don't need Chinese market data, or need trading execution rather than data retrieval. The Tushare dependency adds signup friction.

auth.notes: Requires Tushare API token (free registration at tushare.pro). Token passed via TUSHARE_TOKEN env var or X-Tushare-Token HTTP header for remote deployments. A free shared public endpoint exists at finvestai.top.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Shared public cloud endpoint with rate limits. Self-hosted requires free Tushare account.
pricing.notes: The MCP server itself is open source. Tushare has its own tier system for API access levels. Binance/CoinGecko data is free within their rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: Subject to Tushare and Binance API rate limits. Shared public endpoint has additional rate limiting.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Documentation is primarily in Chinese. Error handling for API failures and rate limits not well documented. Multiple transport modes (stdio, SSE, HTTP) add configuration complexity.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only data queries are inherently idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Documentation and tool descriptions are primarily in Chinese
Tushare API token registration requires Chinese phone number or email verification
43+ tools create a large tool surface that may overwhelm context windows
Multiple transport modes (stdio, SSE, HTTP) with different config requirements
Data freshness depends on upstream API update frequencies

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
